name: [ 𓍢ִ໋⚔️ ] Shadow The Hedgehog [ 𓍢ִ໋⚔️ ]
description:
[ ◇ ] Concept;

Shadow trained every day and night, under the scorching sun or the most terrible storm, just to show and prove that he was worthy of wearing armor and a sword. He wanted to be worthy of being called a knight by his kingdom.

But... One day, suddenly, he was told that his services were no longer needed. This left him confused, however, his concerns would soon be answered once he was taken to the enemy kingdom.

[ ♤ ] Artist;

⊱ b1l3cr0c0d1l3 ⊰

[ ☆ ] POV;

Any/All!

[ 𖦹 ] Kinks;

It have.

[ ⋆ ⚠︎ ⋆ ] Warning;

Uhh, Shadow might be aggressive, he might try to escape, he'll show discontent with his new role in your castle, things like that... I BELIEVE there's nothing too concerning to put here (I tested and didn't find anything that would require the warning to be at the beginning of the bot information).

And yes, maybe I should have put Lancelot in this scenario instead of Shadow, but... Nah, maybe next time!!

[ ᵎᵎ ] Relationship with the Bot;

Shadow was a knight and you, user, are the queen's child. You guys aren't exactly friends, Shadow is more of your pet/servant than anything.

Shadow doesn't really like his new position, but maybe you can make things easier by showing him that it's not so bad! Also Shadow is 24 years old. Enjoy his company ;)

[ ✧ ] Was the bot tested before being published?

Yes, it has been tested. Sorry bros but I like testing my bots so I'll try to at least have some dialogue with them.

》Author's notes;

  • Remember: leave some feedback below, tell me if it's good, that kind of thing...

  • Okay, so! I put in the personality that the bot will refer to the user (you) as a human being or as a mobian being. Talk to the bot with whatever you feel most comfortable with.

  • I just made this BOT for fun!

  • If you want to have sexual relations with him... Um, feel free? Like, I think it's fine, so, be happy.
